shouldShowDivider.description: Decides whether the divider renders above the message, replacing the built-in rule when provided. date/previousDate are the parsed createdAt values (null when missing or invalid); previousMessage is null for the first message in the list.

params.name: params
params.description: The parameters used to decide whether to render the divider.

params.message.name: params.message
params.message.description: The message the divider would render above.

params.previousMessage.name: params.previousMessage
params.previousMessage.description: The previous message, or null for the first message in the list.

params.index.name: params.index
params.index.description: The index of the message in the list.

params.date.name: params.date
params.date.description: The parsed createdAt of the message, or null when missing or invalid.

params.previousDate.name: params.previousDate
params.previousDate.description: The parsed createdAt of the previous message, or null when missing or invalid.

boolean.name: boolean
boolean.description: true to render the divider above the message.
